LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CS GLOBAL SF LLC AND KENNETH MALVAR'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE THIS CASE (GCG-16-551098) WITH CASES CGC-16-551218 AND CGC-16-553895 IS GRANTED. ALL THREE CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY PARTY'S RIGHT TO REQUEST THAT THE TRIAL JUDGE BIFURCATE OR SEVER ANY LAWSUIT, CLAIM, DEFENSE OR ISSUE. THIS CASE IS THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS ARE IN THIS CASE ONLY. CONSOLIDATION IS WARRANTED BECAUSE ALL THREE CASES ARISE OUT OF A COMMON SET OF FACTS AND THERE IS CONSIDERABLE OVERLAP OF ISSUES AND WITNESSES. THESE CASES, AND THE RELATED CASES LIKELY TO BE FILED IN THE FUTURE, MAY REQUIRE SIGNIFICANT CASE MANAGEMENT. THE PARTIES ARE ENCOURAGED TO SEEK COMPLEX DESIGNATION FOR ALL OF THE CONSOLIDATED CASES AND/OR REQUEST THAT THE PRESIDING JUDGE SINGLY ASSIGN THE CASES TO A JUDGE FOR ALL PURPOSES AND/OR STIPULATE TO OR REQUEST THE APPOINTMENT OF A DISCOVERY REFEREE. A LAW AND MOTION JUDGE IS WITHOUT AUTHORITY TO ESTABLISH A PROCEDURE TO HANDLE CASES THAT HAVE NOT YET BEEN FILED AND IS NOT WELL SUITED TO HANDLE CASE MANAGEMENT ISSUES. ORDER SIGNED. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

Cross-defendants Digney York Associates-California, LP and Digney York Associates, Inc.'s Motion to Strike Cross-Complainant's Prayer for Attorney's Fees in the cross-complaint filed by cross-complainant Monique Bell is GRANTED with thirty days leave to amend. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-551218, CGC-16-553895 WITH CASE CGC-16-551098
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Igleheart of Rouda, Feder, Tietjen & McGuinn telephone number 415-398-5398 for Plaintiffs Jacquleine King and Elizabeth Ruts.
Shahrad Milanfar of Becherer Kannett & Schweitzer 510-658-3600 for Defendants CS Global SF LLC and Kenneth Malvar.
Jon-Marc Dobrin of Law Offices of Jon-Marc Dobrin, A.P.C. telephone number 415-459-0307 for Monique Bell.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendants CS Global SF LLC and Kenneth Malvar's motion to consolidate this case (GCG-16-551098) with cases CGC-16-551218 and CGC-16-553895 is granted. All three cases are consolidated for all purposes without prejudice to any party's right to request that the trial judge bifurcate or sever any lawsuit, claim, defense or issue. This case is the lead case and all further filings are in this case only. Consolidation is warranted because all three cases arise out of a common set of facts and there is considerable overlap of issues and witnesses. These cases, and the related cases likely to be filed in the future, may require significant case management. The parties are encouraged to seek complex designation for all of the consolidated cases and/or request that the presiding judge singly assign the cases to a judge for all purposes and/or stipulate to or request the appointment of a discovery referee. A law and motion judge is without authority to establish a procedure to handle cases that have not yet been filed and is not well suited to handle case management issues. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
